description.en-US: This is the Official F-Droid Repository from Freetime Maker for F-Droid. It includes only Apps from Freetime Maker. It gets Updates from Freetime Maker directly and faster than the Official F-Droid Repository from F-Droid and includes Apps that aren't in the F-Droid Repository yet.

whatsNew.en-US:
- Added a "What's New?" Button and Activity in the Settings
- Updated WeatherDetailActivity so it won't show after 30 Minutes that no Weather Data is cached. Instead, it will be cached until an Internet Connection is available
- Added Moon Data and Icons using your own qweather API Key
